## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content creation and SEO services for potential partnership with Conductor](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human oversight, combining technology and agency services](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Conductor seeks to ramp up content production quickly to establish authority in AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [GrowthX's standard package ($18k/month) exceeds Conductor's initial budget; a smaller engagement option will be explored](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Overview

  - [AI-powered workflow engine breaks down content creation tasks](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Dedicated team structure: managing directors, editors, writers, SEO specialists](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Emphasis on quality control and brand voice adherence](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Capability to handle both new content creation and existing content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Flexible approach to match client needs (e.g., podcast repurposing for Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Conductor's Motivations and Goals

  - [Market changes, especially AI's impact on search, driving renewed focus on content and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Aim to rapidly build authority in AI-driven, multi-modal search environments](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [Need to scale content production quickly beyond current in-house capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

### Engagement Structure and Expectations

  - [Standard package: 100,000 words/month for $18,000](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Flexible output (e.g., \~10 pieces/week, but adaptable to client needs)](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Initial "pilot" period focuses on strategy alignment, editorial quality, and early performance indicators](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Performance metrics: GSC impressions, AI visibility (using Conductor's own product)](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

### Budget Considerations

  - [Conductor expressed preference for a smaller initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [GrowthX open to exploring scaled-down options to align with Conductor's budget constraints](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to develop and propose smaller engagement options](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion on revised proposal and potential starting point](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [Conductor to consider internal conversations about budget allocation for this initiative](https://fathom.video/share/wqJvRoYvqppmyGEgJcFwZQL3u9VNdfxh?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
